title: aspidium pleiotomum
intro: Aspidium pleiotomum, also known as the polypody fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Aspidium pleiotomum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and act as a natural antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Aspidium pleiotomum is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine.
